name: hattrick-libs
documentation:
# hattrick_libs

This is a python3 client library for the API of the infamous online-strategy-game hattrick (https://www.hattrick.org).

As this was just intended to be a learning-project and to be the ground-work for another hattrick-project of mine initially,
https://hattrick-fun-with-flags.app, hattick_libs doesn't aim to be complete nor useful to any other purpose than it was originally built for.

If you are looking for a complete python library for hattrick.org consider also pyCHPP by Pierre Gobin. His project was there before mine and 
looks quite sophisticated to me. It's implemented in an object-oriented style and thus well readable and clean. Compared to pyCHPP, hattrick_libs is a 
very basic implementation of the hattrick-API. But consider also this: If you are a learner like myself, hattrick_libs will be a perfect opportunity
to get your hands dirty on some cool python stuff without having to learn oop first. Or you decide to implement your own flavor of a hattick library 
in python and let yourself inspire by both this projects. There is room for all of us. Whatever your decision is: make sure to connect. Refer to the
"Contact" section of this document if you can help improve hattrick_libs, have suggestions, if you want to adopt it to your needs or if you just feel 
like having a chat with another nerdy hattrick manager.

Have fun!:)

## Project state
For now the projects state is work in progress. It originally was just my 2023 christmas project after all!;) I'm actively maintaining it though.
(information as of 2024-10-15)

## Project link
https://github.com/joschobart/hattrick_libs

## Installation
```bash
pip install hattrick-libs 
```

## Usage
In your code directly reference the module you need:
```python
from ht_libs import do_hattrick_request
```
You find a sample-implementation of hattrick_libs in the [\_\_main\_\_.py](__main__.py) file.

## License
This package is licensed under the Apache License 2.0.

## Contact
joschobart on hattrick.org for a chat about bugs, hattrick, (monty) python or discworld.

modules.name: ht_libs.request_token_status
documentation: Function to get data about the actual oauth token.

functions.name: ht_libs.request_token_status.request_token_status
documentation: Get a dict object about the used token

modules.name: ht_libs.get_teamdetails
documentation: Functions to get data from teamdetails.xml.

functions.name: ht_libs.get_teamdetails.get_teamdetails
documentation:
Get a complex dict object with important infos
for a specific user from teamdetails.xml

modules.name: ht_libs.get_flags
documentation:
Functions and helper-functions to get flags of a team.

Hattrick visualizes flags in two matrices on its website. One for home- and 
one for away-flags. Further it distinguishes between flags that were already 
captured and flags still to capture. This module fetches all relevant data 
from the hattrick data-model to reproduce the same information for a given team.

functions.name: ht_libs.get_flags.compile_flags_list
documentation: Helper-Function to create a list of tuples (Flags)

functions.name: ht_libs.get_flags.get_all_flags
documentation: Get a list with all available flags from config.py

functions.name: ht_libs.get_flags.get_my_flags
documentation:
Get a complex dict object with all specific flags (home/away)
for a specific user

functions.name: ht_libs.get_flags.get_missing_flags
documentation:
Get a complex dict object with all specific flags (home/away)
that are missing for a specific user

avatar from staffavatars.xml

modules.name: ht_libs.do_challenge
documentation:
Functions and helper-functions to manage challenges for friendlies.

So far it is possible to get a list of challenged teams, to challenge one 
or multiple opponent teams as well as get information about fixures already
arranged.

functions.name: ht_libs.do_challenge.is_challengeable
documentation:
Get a list object with challengeable teams
from challengeable.xml

functions.name: ht_libs.do_challenge.do_challenge
documentation:
Takes a list of teams to challenge
Returns status of challenges as dict

functions.name: ht_libs.do_challenge.get_challenges
documentation:
Get a dict object with challenged teams
from challenges.xml

documentation: ht_libs constants.

modules.name: ht_libs.do_hattrick_request
documentation: Functions for OAUTH-authentication on hattrick.org.

functions.name: ht_libs.do_hattrick_request.fetch_authorize_url
documentation:
Function for OAUTH Step 1 and 2.

Step 1: Fetch Temporary Credential.
Step 2: Get the auth URL.

```
param oauth_url

Default value = "oob")

param scope

Default value = "")

returns

request_token, request_token_secret

raises

```

functions.name: ht_libs.do_hattrick_request.get_access_token
documentation:
Function for OAUTH Step 3 and 4.

Step 3 : Save auth_pin in var after the client was authorized.
Step 4 : Exchange the request token for an access token.

```
param request_token



param request_token_secret



param auth_pin



returns

access_token_key, access_token_secret

raises

```

functions.name: ht_libs.do_hattrick_request.open_auth_session
documentation:
Function for OAUTH Step 5.

Finally open OAUTH-session.

```
param access_token_key



param access_token_secret



returns

auth_session

raises

```
